notes: Refreshed in spec 39 (pr-comments hardening v2). The W011 severity rose from medium to high between baseline capture and this rerun against the v1.41 SKILL.md; the underlying mitigations (untrusted_comment_body framing, 64 KB body size guard, diff-context validation gate, screening-independence note, argument validators) are documented in the new ## Security model section. Snyk's W011 fires on the presence of `gh api .../comments` ingestion patterns regardless of mitigations — the human-in-the-loop Step 7 confirmation gate plus the diff-context validation gate in Step 6 are the substantive defenses.
